query: Ek baccha mistake karne par rota hai, bahut sensitive hai
translated_query: A child cries when they make a mistake, they are very sensitive

query: Exam ke time ek baccha itna anxious ho jaata hai ki sab bhool jaata hai

query: दो हफ्ते absent रहने के बाद बच्चा बहुत उदास लौटा है और किसी से बात नहीं करता

query: कुछ बच्चे group बना कर एक बच्चे को सभी activities से बाहर रख रहे हैं
translated_query: Some children are forming groups and excluding one child from all activities

query: एक बच्चा कभी भी group में काम नहीं करता, हमेशा अकेले करना चाहता है
translated_query: One child never works in a group, always wants to do things alone

query: एक बच्चा रोज भूखा स्कूल आता है, पूरे दिन उसका ध्यान नहीं लगता
translated_query: A child comes to school hungry every day, can't concentrate all day

query: एक बच्चा बार बार कहता है 'मैं बहुत stupid हूँ', खुद को बेकार समझता है
translated_query: A child keeps saying 'I am very stupid', considers themselves useless

query: Jo baccha pehle topper tha ab fail ho raha hai aur bahut withdrawn ho gaya hai
translated_query: A child who was previously a topper is now failing and has become very withdrawn

query: Do hafte baad aaya to bahut udaas tha, kisi se baat nahi karta ab
translated_query: After two weeks came back very sad, doesn't talk to anyone now

query: Kuch bachche group bana kar ek bacche ko activities se bahar rakh rahe hain
translated_query: Some children are forming groups and excluding one child from activities

query: Ek baccha kabhi group mein kaam nahi karta, hamesha akele karna chahta hai
translated_query: One child never works in a group, always wants to do things alone

query: Ek baccha roz bhooka school aata hai, din bhar concentrate nahi kar pata
translated_query: A child comes to school hungry every day, can't concentrate throughout the day

query: Ek baccha baar baar kehta hai 'main bahut stupid hoon', khud ko bekar samajhta hai
translated_query: A child keeps saying 'I am very stupid', considers themselves worthless

query: எப்போதும் முதலிடத்தில் இருந்த மாணவன் தோல்வி அடைகிறான், மிகவும் தனிமையாகி விட்டான்
translated_query: A student who always topped is now failing and has become very withdrawn

query: இரண்டு வாரங்கள் இல்லாமல் வந்த மாணவன் மிகவும் சோகமாக வந்தான், யாரிடமும் பேசவில்லை
translated_query: After two weeks of absence the student came back very sad and doesn't talk to anyone

query: சில மாணவர்கள் குழு உருவாக்கி ஒரு குழந்தையை எல்லா செயல்பாடுகளிலிருந்தும் ஒதுக்குகிறார்கள்
translated_query: Some students are forming groups and excluding one child from all activities

query: ஒரு மாணவன் குழு வேலையை மறுக்கிறான், எப்போதும் தனியாக செய்ய விரும்புகிறான்
translated_query: A student refuses group work, always wants to do things alone

query: ஒரு குழந்தை தினமும் பசியுடன் பள்ளிக்கு வருகிறது, நாள் முழுவதும் கவனிக்கவில்லை
translated_query: A child comes to school hungry every day, doesn't concentrate all day

query: ஒரு குழந்தை தொடர்ந்து 'நான் மிகவும் முட்டாள்' என்று சொல்கிறது
translated_query: A child keeps saying 'I am very stupid'

query: ఎప్పుడూ టాపర్‌గా ఉన్న విద్యార్థి ఇప్పుడు ఫెయిల్ అవుతున్నాడు మరియు చాలా దూరంగా ఉన్నాడు
translated_query: A student who was always a topper is now failing and has become very withdrawn

query: రెండు వారాల తర్వాత వచ్చిన విద్యార్థి చాలా దుఃఖంగా ఉన్నాడు, ఎవరితోనూ మాట్లాడడు
translated_query: After two weeks of absence the student came back very sad and doesn't talk to anyone

query: కొంతమంది విద్యార్థులు గుంపులు చేసుకుని ఒక పిల్లవాడిని అన్ని కార్యకలాపాల నుండి మినహాయిస్తున్నారు
translated_query: Some students are forming groups and excluding one child from all activities

query: ఒక విద్యార్థి గ్రూప్ వర్క్ చేయడానికి ఎప్పుడూ నిరాకరిస్తాడు, ఒంటరిగా చేయాలని ఉంటాడు
translated_query: A student always refuses group work, wants to do things alone

query: ఒక పిల్లవాడు రోజూ పాఠశాలకు ఆకలిగా వస్తున్నాడు, రోజంతా ఏకాగ్రత లేదు
translated_query: A child comes to school hungry every day, no concentration throughout the day

query: ఒక పిల్లవాడు పదే పదే 'నేను చాలా stupid' అని చెప్తాడు, తనను తాను నిందించుకుంటాడు
translated_query: A child keeps saying 'I am very stupid' and blames themselves
